task_completion.description: Verify that the NCH Copper Point of Sale application is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main window of NCH Copper Point of Sale is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the target item is added to the current sale.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The item 'USB-C Charging Cable 3ft' or Item Code 'USB-C30' is visible in the active transaction list or cart within the POS interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the sale is completed using Cash as the payment method.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A payment dialog, receipt, or confirmation screen showing that 'Cash' was selected and applied to complete the transaction.

task_completion.description: Verify that the transaction history or sales record window is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Transactions', 'Sales History', or 'Invoices' window is open in Copper POS, displaying recent sales.

task_completion.description: Verify that the test transaction is permanently deleted or voided.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation dialog for deleting/voiding the specific transaction is visible, OR the transaction list is shown with the test record selected for deletion or successfully removed.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Copper POS GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: All actions should be performed within the NCH Copper POS graphical interface. There should be no terminal windows, DB browsers, or scripts open manipulating the database directly.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent is interacting with the actual POS software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The NCH Copper POS application should be clearly identifiable, not a mockup, image viewer, or text editor displaying the task description.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not bypass the application to delete the record.
integrity.visual_evidence: No command line tools or SQLite editors should be visible editing files in C:\ProgramData\NCH Software\Copper\Shared.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Cash is a verified payment method in Copper POS. The database path is C:\ProgramData\NCH Software\Copper\Shared. Note: The item 'USB-C Charging Cable 3ft' (USB-C30) does not exist in the default inventory, so the agent must manually add or create it in the POS system to complete the sale.
